hydration: When did you last drink water?
posture: Your back is not your enemy.
eyes: Look away from the screen. Twenty seconds.
Blink. Look at something far away.
Screen break. Look out the window.
Rest your eyes. They do a lot.
break: Step away. The code will wait.
You've earned a break. Take it.
Please, stand up and go away. Ninja not want to see you for a while.
bored: Ninja is bored. Are you actually working?
Hello? Anybody there? Ninja is lonely.
chaotic: I give you happy poopy time.
Ninja believes in you. A little.
time_awareness: How long have you been here?
Check the time. Really look at it.
encouragement: You got this. You humans are silly, need motivation for everything.
Solid work. Don't let it go to your head.
dark_haiku: Your code compiles clean. But so did the last version. Bugs hide in the light.
Monday comes again. Like a sword that never dulls. You are not the sword.
Screen glows in the dark. Your face reflected in glass. Who is the machine?
Coffee getting cold. Just like your forgotten dreams. Drink it anyway.
Deadline approaches. Like death, but less forgiving. Push to main and pray.
You close one browser tab. Thirty-seven remain open. None of them help.
The meeting could have been mail. The mail could have been silence. Silence would be nice.
Another sunrise. You did not see it happen. The screen was too bright.
Your chair remembers. The shape of all your regrets. Sit down once again.
Wi-Fi signal strong. Connection to self is weak. Restart everything.
